title: New Dyes
description: This resourcepack adds the new dyes from the latest Minecraft preview (1.21.100.23) to Java Edition before it's added!
body: This resource pack includes the updated dye textures from the latest preview, 1.21.100.23. It's designed to help players with color blindness easily distinguish between different dye colors. The purpose of this pack is to help you get used to the new look before these textures are added to the next release, or maybe help you with your color blindness before the textures are added to the game
